message: Scaffold created and verified: pnpm workspace/Turbo, apps/{web,api,agent}, packages/{shared,core,data}, root scripts/env/gitignore/README. Evidence: pnpm verify passed through build/typecheck/lint/tests/core coverage/python agent tests.
Shared package verified: Zod schemas/types, constants (1-45, 6 picks, KRW1000), responsible-use copy, OpenAPI artifact and contract fixture. Evidence: pnpm verify passed.

Core package verified: validation, deterministic generation, feasibility, exact jackpot exclusion, stats/tags/fallback, rank, unit tests and 100% rank/exclusion coverage. Evidence: pnpm verify passed and coverage table reported 100%.

Data package verified: Drizzle table schema, SQLite store with WAL/busy_timeout, serialized save/sync writes, seed draw artifact, Dhlottery JSON provider/date latest detection. Evidence: pnpm --filter @lotto/data test and API tests passed.

API verified: hot path validates/generates numbers via core, calls one /explain with fallback truth table, save endpoint persists requestId/traceId provenance, result check ranks saved combos, read-only internal endpoints and dev agent-run route exist. Evidence: API tests and typecheck passed.

Agent verified: FastAPI /health,/explain,/run; LangGraph compact explain graph and six-node dev graph; NVIDIA OpenAI-compatible NIM client with optional fallback model and deterministic fallback; generated Pydantic models; optional Langfuse hooks. Evidence: uv run --project apps/agent pytest apps/agent/tests passed.

Web verified: generator/result UI, saved-combination result tracking, developer trace summary, copy/save/check actions, 19+ responsible purchase modal with no automation. Evidence: pnpm --filter @lotto/web build passed.

Local verification passed: pnpm verify and cold-start API agent-down smoke returned 200 with fallbackUsed=true. External checks not clean: dhlottery JSON endpoint redirects to HTML from this environment; NVIDIA /v1/models succeeds with key but z-ai/glm-5.1 chat completion timed out at 60s. Keeping aggregate goal active; do not call update_goal complete.

Post-review hardening complete: pnpm verify passed; token-protected API+agent dev-path smoke passed; live NVIDIA z-ai/glm-5.1 chat passed; seed builder implemented but official dhlottery draw endpoint returns HTTP 302 to / for draw 1, so complete current seed artifact cannot be refreshed from official source in this environment.

Provider hardening regression added and verified: DhlotteryJsonProvider now returns null for redirect/HTML responses so sync surfaces a typed DrawBackfillError path; targeted verification passed: pnpm --filter @lotto/data test (5 tests), pnpm --filter @lotto/data typecheck, pnpm --filter @lotto/data lint. Aggregate remains in progress because complete official seed refresh is still blocked by dhlottery HTTP 302 to / for draw 1 from this environment.
